decisions.rationale: 40 LOC vs 350 LOC, 0 scorers touched, zero regression risk
Higher signal-to-noise, negation-aware matching eliminates 'safety instruction' false positives

decisions.decision: No batch module — extend doctor instead
decisions.rationale: Doctor already has discovery + scoring + table output

decisions.decision: 3 viral features added: compare, suggest, report --gist
decisions.rationale: High impact/effort ratio, creates shareable moments for launch
S1=core, S2=security, S3=web — minimize cli.py conflicts via serialized merges
False positive rate not validated at scale yet, would break existing CI

decisions.decision: Per-format composite weights deferred to v7.1
decisions.rationale: No data to validate different weights, premature optimization

decisions.rationale: 11.75% breakout rate on weekends vs 9.5% weekdays, HN account needs karma first
